nasb.text: Thus says the Lord God, ‘You will drink your sister’s cup, Which is deep and wide. You will be laughed at and held in derision; It contains much.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord God: “You shall drink your sister’s cup that is deep and large; you shall be laughed at and held in derision, for it contains much;

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說： 你必喝你姊姊所喝的杯， 那杯又深又闊， 容量甚大， 必使你成為嗤笑和譏諷的對象。

ccb.text: “主耶和华说， “‘你必喝你姐姐那又大又深的杯， 成为人们耻笑和辱骂的对象。
